name: TextAgent
description: Customer service text agent that processes text queries, searches knowledge bases, and provides warranty/product information.

skills.name: Knowledge Base Query
skills.description: Search product information, warranty terms, troubleshooting guides, and assembly instructions.
examples: What is the warranty on the BlenderMax 3000?
How do I assemble step 4 of the KALLAX shelf?
What does error code E3 mean on my washing machine?

skills.name: Action Recommendation
skills.description: Recommend customer service actions based on product context and customer situation.
examples: Customer dropped their blender and blade is bent. What action should we take?
Product arrived damaged in box. Recommend next steps.
